_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic Suppression of NF1 Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cell Growth in Culture and Orthotopic Xenografts by Combinational Treatment with Statin and Prodrug Farnesyltransferase Inhibitor PAMAM G4 Dendrimers.

_contextSnippet: Neither 0.5 μM of lovastatin nor concentrations of IG 2 up to 5 μM affected iSC colony formation...we observed no synergistic suppression of iSC colony formation following co-treatment with lovastatin and IG 2
details: Neither 0.5 μM lovastatin nor concentrations of IG2 up to 5 μM affected colony formation, and no synergistic suppression observed with co-treatment
